gauge.name: Gila River at Coolidge Dam

impacts.statement: Coolidge Dam is overtopped. Flows of over 120000 cubic feet per second will cause massive bank erosion and damage near Winkleman.
Homes threatened on the southeast side of winkleman. Resulting backup of san pedro river threatens numerous homes near dudleyville.
Water begins to backup into the San Pedro River towards Dudleyville.
Highway 77 bridge abutments are threatened due to debris and bank erosion.
Winkleman flats and other parks near the river are flooded.
Precautionary evacuations in the RV Park in Winkleman Flats.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
